evidence: LLDB batch debugging was attempted twice but could not launch because macOS debugserver is unavailable in this environment. Fallback runtime capture with the debug-symbol binary proves the bad state: poc_real.cpp passes ZeroCopyInputStream* input = nullptr into Tokenizer(input, nullptr); the constructor immediately calls Refresh() at tokenizer.cc:203; the inlined fault resolves to tokenizer.cc:275 where Refresh() executes input_->Next(&data, &buffer_size_) without a null check; AddressSanitizer reports a READ on address 0x000000000000 and the captured arm64 register state shows x[0] = 0x0000000000000000, consistent with dereferencing a null input_ object pointer.
